title: Senior Software Engineer - L&T Infotech - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - L&T Infotech - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? L&T Infotech in Aurangabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About L&T Infotech:
L&T Infotech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Infotech!
